headline: These S&P500 stocks that are showing activity before the opening bell on Monday.

headline: Leidos completes $2.4 billion acquisition of ENTRUST
summary: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) has completed its previously announced approximately $2.4 billion acquisition of ENTRUST Solutions Group from Kohlberg, creating a scaled, end-to-end energy infrastructure organization focused on grid modernization and helping utilities nationwide improve reliability and meet rising power demand.

raw.headline: Leidos completes $2.4 billion acquisition of ENTRUST

headline: Leidos Holdings shares are trading higher after the company announced it completed the acquisition of power and gas engineering consultancy ENTRUST Solutions Group.
